summary: Top‑notch recording captures a smoking first set with Jerry and Phil firing on all cylinders
review: The reviewer hails the first set as “absolutely smoking,” praising Jerry’s guitar work and Phil’s bass while noting that the rest of the band rides that energy. The audio is described as top‑notch, with guitars loud and clear and vocals slightly recessed but still enjoyable. No comments on the second set are offered.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review highlights an outstanding first‑set performance and excellent sound quality, leading to a high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Guitars are loud and clear; vocals a bit less prominent but overall top‑notch clarity and balance

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as a standout, high‑energy performance; second set not evaluated by reviewer

band_member_comments.Jerry: Firing on all cylinders with inspiring guitar work
band_member_comments.Phil: Strong bass playing, matching Jerry’s intensity
